title: Finnish Experiences of Disability and Aging 2021
description: The dataset consists of self-administered written texts written by elderly people who have a disability. The writing invitation was aimed at individuals who are ageing with a disability and individuals with age-related disabilities or handicaps. In the writing guidelines, the participants were presented with questions that they could use to help guide their writing.
